descriptionParagraphs: The File Fifty from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Elite Performance.

A team favourite, the File Fifty offers Elite Performance. Featuring a medium entry and exit rocker, sensitive low rails for maximum control and bite, and a speed-generating deep single concave that runs from the nose through the tail. The deepest point of the concave is positioned between the fins providing an abundance of drive and grip through high-speed manoeuvres. The File Fifty offers Elite Performance in various conditions and sizes but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.
If you are looking for Elite Performance, choose the File Fifty.

E3-Lite Epoxy Technology The E3-Lite epoxy glassing technology has been developed with leading composite material firms to develop custom carbon/Innegra tapes to produce incredible results with unmatched performance. E3 Epoxy tech features a super tight cell structured core, a stringer-less EPS blank, and a 4oz layer of fiberglass on the bottom combined with a custom Innegra/carbon tape. The deck is layered with SharpEye's custom triple carbon tape with a layer of Bi-axle 4oz cloth. SharpEye's commitment to innovation and constant improvement has paid off with the E3 Lite technology. Zero Compromise.
